modmenu.summaryTranslation.swordhitbox: Shows entity hitboxes while holding a sword (visual aid, client-side).
swordhitbox.name: SwordHitbox
swordhitbox.config.enabled.tooltip: When on, holding a sword outlines the hitbox of nearby living entities.
swordhitbox.config.highlight_in_range.to: When on, entities within attack range are drawn in the in-range color instead of the box color. Off by default.
swordhitbox.config.box_color.tooltip: Packed ARGB color of the hitbox outline, e.g. 0xFFFFFFFF (white).
swordhitbox.config.in_range_color.toolti: Packed ARGB color used for in-range entities when highlighting is on, e.g. 0xFFFF0000 (red).
swordhitbox.config.radius.tooltip: How far around you living entities are searched for outlining. Clamped between 4 and 64.
